one_sentence_fix: Rebuild the S3 beluga to read as a dimensional cold-rim-lit animal rather than a flat illustration (recover the GPU PBR path or hand-shade a gradient-mesh with real volume), and fill the dead lower-thirds on S3/S5/S8.
editor_notes: No hard fails; ships at 8.77 vs 8.3. Caveats disclosed in the email: (1) the S3 beluga hero is the designed Canvas fallback because the akthree GPU snapshot sentinel false-negatived on the transparent subject, and it reads flat (the deck's weakest surface). (2) Honesty is clean: no invented detection-accuracy percentage, the 331 count is hedged (may be stabilizing, still about three quarters below 1979), and the S8 boundary box shows noise/prey/habitat with no intake port.

criteria.name: Thumb-stop cover
criteria.notes: Strong specific claim in huge type + '331 LEFT' kicker, but type-only cover and the gold call is small at 432px.

criteria.name: Story arc & swipe momentum
criteria.notes: Clean beats; loops plant and pay; contact sheet reads as one composed sequence.

criteria.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
criteria.notes: Real atmosphere (shafts, hydrophone, chart panel) but the S3 beluga shipped as the flat Canvas fallback (akthree snapshot false-negative); dead lower-thirds on S3/S5/S8.

criteria.name: Story-art fusion
criteria.notes: The single gold call that never multiplies IS the thesis; S7 honest chart; S8 boundary box with no intake port; water unchanged S1 vs S8.

criteria.name: Alaska authenticity & local relevance
criteria.notes: Cook Inlet, Anchorage coords, NOAA/ADF&G, the iconic endangered beluga, named numbers; slightly less place-specific in open water.

criteria.name: Insight density & factual weight
criteria.notes: Each content slide adds a new verified specific; 25 to 50 words; cover intentionally number-lean.

criteria.name: Variety vs ledger
criteria.notes: Composition, palette, type, hook, and continuity all diverge from decks 9 to 12; dials justified.

criteria.name: Legibility & platform fitness
criteria.notes: Floors met, vector PDF with title, counters + depth readouts; one squeaker on small mono ticks.

criteria.name: Copy: voice & hook
criteria.notes: Hook ~92 chars, caption 685 in band, position-taking, real debatable close, grade 8 to 10.

criteria.name: Deliverable completeness
criteria.notes: Post copy, 3 hashtags, first-comment sources, title, aftercare present; URL resolution verified on main.

(2) Honesty is clean: no invented detection-accuracy percentage, the 331 count is hedged (may be stabilizing, still about three quarters below 1979), and the S8 boundary box shows noise/prey/habitat with no intake port.
